sections.paragraph:
to be redundant, abundant, prop. used of full and ample garments and curtains, and curtains hanging down; hence to be over and above, used of food, Exo 16:23 of money, Lev 25:27 of men, Num 3:46, 48 , 49 .

Hiphil, to collect, or have what is over and above, Exo 16:18. (Arab. غدف to give what is over and above, too much; Conj. IV. to loosen a vail.)

I.
